strengths: 13+ years full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators
Strong testing/craftsmanship background (TDD, Vitest-adjacent ecosystems, workshops)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
Limited recent Kotlin/Java exposure for secondary backend services
Cloud platform experience (AWS/GCP/Azure) only briefly indicated via AWS CDK
response.justification: The candidate brings well over a decade of full-stack engineering experience with a strong match on the primary TypeScript/Node.js/React stack, hands-on AI-agent and MCP work that directly aligns with the role's AI requirement, and a deep craftsmanship/testing culture. Gaps include no stated Nest.js experience and limited modern Kotlin/Java or broad cloud-platform exposure, though the overall profile suggests strong adaptability to fill these.
